description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a gable roof covered in dark, textured tiles. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray material, and the lower portion of the house features a stone or brick facade. Large rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, providing ample natural light. The front of the house includes a covered entryway with a brick overhang and a recessed door, partially enclosed by a short stone wall. The overall design is simple and functional, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements.
description: A two-story house with a gable roof, light gray walls, large rectangular windows, and a brick-covered entryway.
description_view_0: This view shows the side of the house with two large windows on the upper floor, two smaller windows below, and a partial view of the brick entryway and stone wall.
description_view_1: The front view highlights the main entryway with a brick overhang, large double windows, and the enclosing stone wall.
description_view_2: This side view mirrors the opposite side, showing two large upper windows, two smaller lower windows, and the brick entryway from a different angle.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the plain gable end of the house with no windows or doors visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with a brick overhang, single door, and partial stone wall enclosure
